llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Business Development and TD - CASE Applications
job.description: O bjectives of the Position To implement CASE and eMobility, Performance Materials India sales marketing strategy in new business development and customers’ management by initiating contacts with existing and potential customers. Develop execute Business Development plan for CASE and eMobility in accordance with the country regional strategy and objectives. Establish foster strong relationship with customers industry. Identifying new business opportunities, managing relationships with key stakeholders, and executing strategic initiatives to meet CASE's business goals. M ain Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Business Development: Provide technical support and expertise on CASE (coatings, composites, adhesives, sealants, and elastomers) and eMobility products to clients and internal teams. Understand product specifications, applications, and industry standards. Identify, evaluate, develop, pursue, and implement new business opportunities and strategies that align with CASE's goals and objectives to increase market share and revenue. Assist the sales team with technical presentations, product demonstrations, and client training sessions. Collaborate with Technical Development Product Development teams to improve existing products and develop new solutions based on market needs. Manage projects related to product applications, client requirements, and technical support. Oversee and manage business development projects, ensuring timely and successful completion. Prepare and present regular reports on business development activities, market analysis, and client feedback. Monitor and report on business development activities, providing insights and recommendations for continuous improvement. Conduct market research to identify trends, competitor activities, and potential areas for growth. Provide insights to guide business strategies. Strategy: Define CASE and eMobility milestones, market directions, project pipeline (products applications), volume, profit, product portfolio and developmental goals directions in India. Identify business opportunity for established and new customer/product/application and develop value proposition on products and pricing for CASE and eMobility in India and provide on-going update to the regional team. Monitor and analyze development in the segment and initiate improvement opportunities. Scout, identify, analyze, define and set up target applications, target customers (OEMs Tiers), target products and drive the business...
